sources.name: ASI Manufacturing Data (2018-19 to 2021-22)
sources.note: Contains industry-state level data on GVA, output, and employment for formal manufacturing sector.

sources.name: CEA Monthly Renewable Generation Data
sources.note: Provides plant-level renewable energy generation (solar and wind), used for sectoral comparison.
